---
title: "14 Calculate 5 Year Dividend Performance"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: calculate total dividends over the last five years and derive rough yield.
      # One misspelled variable in summarize is intentionally included.
  yr5 <-as.integer(format(Sys.Date() - years(5), "%y"))

div_5yr <- divs_by_year %>%
 filter(year >= yr5)  %>%
   group_by(symbol) %>%
  summarise(
    total_div_5y= sum(total_dividens, na.rm= TRUE),  # typo on purpose
.groups = "drop"
 ) %>%
   left_join(stock5yr_metrics, by = "symbol")  %>%
  mutate(div_yield_5y = total_div_5y / PriceStart5)

    # Intent: display top by absolute dividends.
 div_5yr %>% arrange(desc(total_div_5y)) %>% head(8)
```
